# GAX Global

GAX Global is a US-focused AI infrastructure, DevSecOps, Kubernetes, CI/CD, cloud security, and platform reliability consultancy for SaaS and AI teams.

## Key Pages

- Website: https://gax-global.com/
- Services: https://gax-global.com/services/
- Infrastructure review: https://gax-global.com/infrastructure-review/
- Insights: https://gax-global.com/insights/
- Infrastructure review booking: https://cal.com/gaxglobal/infrastructure-review

## Services

- AI infrastructure and LLM platform reliability
- DevSecOps and compliance readiness
- Kubernetes and platform operations
- CI/CD and GitOps delivery
- Cloud security, architecture, and networking
- Cost, observability, and production reliability improvements

## Contact

- Email: info@gax-global.com
